description: Seed injects VIEW_ANNOUNCE and then WANT before MANIFEST/HEADS so the reader rejects the transcript for missing head context
notes: Simulator adds view-sync capability to HELLO, injects VIEW_ANNOUNCE, then injects WANT before MANIFEST or HEADS establish sync roots.
The transcript should fail on the standard prior-MANIFEST-or-HEADS rule, proving that VIEW_ANNOUNCE alone does not unlock WANT.
